name: Stuffed Date Drops
recipeInstructions:
1. Stuff dates with pecan halves.
2. Preheat electric oven to 400°F.
3. Grease baking sheets.
4. In a small bowl of an electric mixer, cream together shortening and brown sugar until smooth.
5. Beat in egg.
6. Sift flour, baking powder, baking soda, and salt into the mixture.
7. Add the flour mixture alternately with sour cream to the creamed mixture, mixing gently after each addition.
8. Dip each date into the creamed mixture to cover evenly.
9. Place the dates on prepared baking sheets.
10. Bake for 8 to 10 minutes or until lightly golden brown.
11. Cool completely.
12. In a small saucepan, melt butter and allow it to cool slightly.
13. In a separate bowl of an electric mixer, beat butter with powdered sugar and vanilla extract until smooth.
14. Gradually add water, beating continuously until the frosting reaches a spreading consistency.
15. Spread the frosting over the cooled cookies.
16. Makes 6 dozen cookies.
